scope: Post-Phase K product convergence, truthful product state, and Phase L integration scope

status_policy.rationale: Mitigated and accepted risks retain a future observation or resolution work unit; only resolved records have completed resolution evidence.

risks.description: cau_003 still requires duplicate-evidence review before it can be exposed.
risks.resolution_evidence: H fixture evidence exercises the existing detail and attachment extractor. The bounded live closure confirmed that cau_003's current generic list candidates are not verified notice-detail mappings without source-specific configuration; duplicate evidence remains review-only.
risks.evidence: H fixture evidence exercises the existing detail and attachment extractor. The bounded live closure confirmed that cau_003's current generic list candidates are not verified notice-detail mappings without source-specific configuration; duplicate evidence remains review-only.
risks.deferral_reason: Mitigation preserves review-only handling, but no persisted reviewer decision lifecycle exists yet.
risks.next_work_unit: Implement and rehearse append-only duplicate review decisions
risks.success_criteria: A reviewer can compare duplicate evidence and record an explicit decision.

risks.description: cau_012 source coverage remains incomplete and is not represented as absence evidence.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: cau_012 is absent from the committed source inventory; bounded crawl evidence cannot establish canonical identity.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase H bounded coverage evidence records cau_012 as absent from the committed source inventory and preserves that this is not source-absence evidence.
risks.deferral_reason: cau_012 is absent from the committed source inventory; bounded crawl evidence cannot establish canonical identity.
risks.next_work_unit: Source identity inventory alignment and bounded coverage evidence
risks.success_criteria: Bounded source coverage evidence is captured with an explicit result classification.

risks.description: cau_008 has incomplete batch evidence and remains hidden from public exposure.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: The bounded live closure reached the configured list endpoint but source-specific list-to-notice mapping is absent, so attachment candidates cannot be credited as notice attachments. Download and attachment content interpretation remain out of scope.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase H bounded live closure reached the configured list endpoint but did not establish attributable notice attachments because source-specific list-to-notice mapping is absent.
risks.deferral_reason: The bounded live closure reached the configured list endpoint but source-specific list-to-notice mapping is absent, so attachment candidates cannot be credited as notice attachments. Download and attachment content interpretation remain out of scope.
risks.next_work_unit: Source-specific list-to-detail mapping, attachment/parser convergence, and bounded source recheck
risks.success_criteria: A source-specific notice mapping and bounded recheck produce attributable attachment metadata, or a documented exception resolves the incomplete-batch state.

risks.description: Attachment extraction and download verification are not complete.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: H performs metadata-only evidence and does not download or interpret complex attachment content.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase H validation records metadata-only attachment evidence and explicitly excludes attachment download and complex-content interpretation.
risks.deferral_reason: H performs metadata-only evidence and does not download or interpret complex attachment content.
risks.next_work_unit: Attachment/parser convergence with deterministic extraction evidence and bounded source recheck
risks.success_criteria: Complex attachment cases have deterministic extraction evidence and explicit review handling.

risks.description: cau_007 zero-match observation is not proof of source exhaustion or scholarship absence.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: The bounded live closure reached HTTP 200 responses, but the current generic anchor candidates are not verified notice-detail mappings because source-specific mapping configuration is absent.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase H bounded live closure reached HTTP 200 responses but records that generic anchor candidates are not verified notice-detail mappings.
risks.deferral_reason: The bounded live closure reached HTTP 200 responses, but the current generic anchor candidates are not verified notice-detail mappings because source-specific mapping configuration is absent.
risks.next_work_unit: Source-specific list-to-detail mapping, readable-body and encoding verification, and bounded source recheck
risks.success_criteria: A bounded source-specific mapping recheck records attributable notice-body evidence without turning zero match into absence.

risks.description: Contextual keyword detection can still miss or overclassify scholarship notices.
risks.resolution_evidence: H classifies bounded candidates as contextual_only or insufficient_evidence and leaves the production detector unchanged.
risks.evidence: H classifies bounded candidates as contextual_only or insufficient_evidence and leaves the production detector unchanged.
risks.deferral_reason: The bounded corpus is a mitigation evidence set, not a completed precision and recall resolution for future sources.
risks.next_work_unit: Bounded contextual keyword detector corpus recheck
risks.success_criteria: A bounded corpus has measured contextual keyword precision and recall review evidence.

risks.description: The available fixture subset is not nationwide scholarship coverage.
risks.resolution_evidence: H records a four-source bounded fixture comparison and a live closure. cau_002 failed closed on local TLS certificate verification, while three generic list mappings remain unverified; the non-completeness limitation is preserved.
risks.evidence: H records a four-source bounded fixture comparison and a live closure. cau_002 failed closed on local TLS certificate verification, while three generic list mappings remain unverified; the non-completeness limitation is preserved.
risks.deferral_reason: The accepted bounded-coverage boundary prevents overclaiming but does not establish nationwide source coverage.
risks.next_work_unit: Bounded source coverage expansion and observation-window recheck
risks.success_criteria: Coverage claims are tied to a published bounded source inventory and observation window.

risks.description: The G verification environment resolved @next/env, sharp, and unrs-resolver bootstrap concerns.
risks.success_criteria: A standard Node and package-manager environment completes the documented build verification.

risks.description: Review decisions are read-only diagnostics and are not persisted.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase J defines append-only review decision events, evidence references, effective-decision projection, compatibility boundaries, and rollback design; implementation remains separately gated.
risks.deferral_reason: The design is complete but no target inventory, migration, persistence implementation, or rehearsal is authorized.
risks.next_work_unit: Implement and rehearse the approved review event and effective projection model
risks.success_criteria: An approved schema and auditable review-decision lifecycle are implemented and reviewed.

risks.description: The normalized graph has not been approved or migrated into the production schema.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase J provides the additive graph schema proposal, consumer compatibility matrix, migration gates, backfill plan, and rollback design.
risks.deferral_reason: Target schema inventory, final SQL, RLS review, and non-production rehearsal remain absent.
risks.next_work_unit: Approve target-aligned graph migration SQL and non-production rehearsal
risks.success_criteria: A schema proposal is approved with compatibility, rollback, and migration plans.

risks.description: No production apply path is approved or implemented.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase J defines explicit allowlist, confirmation, plan/apply separation, fingerprint, audit, stop, rollback, and reconciliation gates.
risks.deferral_reason: No executable apply path, target inventory, rehearsal, or production authorization exists.
risks.next_work_unit: Implement and rehearse guarded apply controls in non-production
risks.success_criteria: A separately approved guarded apply design passes dry-run, audit, and rollback review.

risks.description: The production build observed a warning that public.site_settings was absent from the schema cache.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: H does not inspect or migrate the target environment schema.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase G build verification observed the public.site_settings schema-cache warning without inspecting the target environment.
risks.deferral_reason: H does not inspect or migrate the target environment schema.
risks.next_work_unit: Collect sanitized schema-cache evidence and prepare target-aligned remediation
risks.success_criteria: Confirm whether site_settings exists in the target environment schema; if needed, prepare a migration and compatibility plan.

risks.description: Deterministic replay validates evidence and policy contracts but not external model quality, prompt robustness, outage behavior, cost, latency, or version drift.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: No provider credential or live call is used in the bounded prototype; automatic decisions and persistence remain prohibited.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase I deterministic replay validates the evidence and policy contract with zero external provider calls and no persistence.
risks.deferral_reason: No provider credential or live call is used in the bounded prototype; automatic decisions and persistence remain prohibited.
risks.next_work_unit: Provider audit, privacy, cost, and production-readiness evaluation
risks.success_criteria: A separately approved provider evaluation records quality, citation correctness, prompt-injection resistance, outage fallback, privacy, latency, and cost evidence without enabling automatic approval.

risks.description: The main-repository ESLint baseline has eleven existing errors and five warnings outside the K change set.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: K does not widen product convergence into unrelated application-wide lint remediation; all K-changed TypeScript files pass direct ESLint.
risks.evidence: K full lint reports eleven errors and five warnings outside the changed-file set, while focused K ESLint passes with zero findings.
risks.deferral_reason: K does not widen product convergence into unrelated application-wide lint remediation; all K-changed TypeScript files pass direct ESLint.
risks.next_work_unit: Main repository lint baseline remediation
risks.success_criteria: Main ESLint errors are remediated or explicitly baselined without introducing new errors in later phase changes.

risks.description: Target-environment schema, migration history, row-count, RLS, and schema-cache evidence is unavailable.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase J repository inventory explicitly distinguishes committed migrations, generated types, runtime expectations, and unknown target state.
risks.deferral_reason: J prohibits production/staging database access and requests sanitized metadata from an authorized operator.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: J prohibits production/staging database access and requests sanitized metadata from an authorized operator.
risks.next_work_unit: J-M0 sanitized target schema inventory gate
risks.success_criteria: A redacted target inventory and stable schema fingerprint satisfy J-M0.

risks.description: Committed migrations do not fully reproduce generated-type and runtime table expectations.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase J inventory records notice_sources migration evidence alongside generated-type-only crawled_notices, scholarships, and site_settings expectations.
risks.deferral_reason: Only target migration history and schema metadata can resolve the divergence.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: Only target migration history and schema metadata can resolve the divergence.
risks.next_work_unit: Compare J-M0 inventory with committed migration history before SQL review
risks.success_criteria: Every target dependency is classified as already present, additive, or explicitly out of scope.

risks.description: Legacy records can lack stable article IDs, canonical URLs, source mappings, or attributable provenance.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase J backfill plan defines exact mapping, review, ambiguity, missing-source, missing-evidence, and legacy-public-only classes.
risks.deferral_reason: No backfill inventory or human-reviewed exception set is authorized in J.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: No backfill inventory or human-reviewed exception set is authorized in J.
risks.next_work_unit: J-M3 bounded backfill dry-run and exception review
risks.success_criteria: Dry-run has deterministic class counts and zero unresolved records proposed for apply.

risks.description: New graph/event/projection policies may not be compatible with existing admin and public access paths.
risks.evidence: notice_sources has committed RLS policies, while target policies for other required tables remain unknown.
risks.deferral_reason: J does not access target policy metadata or implement policies.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: J does not access target policy metadata or implement policies.
risks.next_work_unit: J-M0 policy inventory and additive RLS review
risks.success_criteria: Authorized policy review proves least-privilege graph/admin/public paths in non-production.

risks.description: Effective approved review states may not map one-to-one to existing scholarship rows without duplicate or route regression.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase J preserves scholarships numeric IDs and defines a future projection mapping with unique and reconciliation constraints.
risks.deferral_reason: No projection implementation, backfill, or public reconciliation rehearsal is authorized.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: No projection implementation, backfill, or public reconciliation rehearsal is authorized.
risks.next_work_unit: J-M5 public projection integration rehearsal
risks.success_criteria: A non-production replay preserves every existing public ID and emits no duplicate projection.

risks.description: Report-backed G public data can be mistaken for live crawler output or a DB-backed public projection.
risks.evidence: K adds public snapshot status, fail-closed scope, hidden-item count, and attachment verification limits to the existing list and detail routes.
risks.deferral_reason: The UI is now truthful, but a controlled DB-backed public projection does not exist yet.
risks.next_work_unit: Controlled public projection preview and report-to-projection parity reconciliation
risks.success_criteria: A non-production controlled projection reconciles the selected cohort without blocked, unresolved, or report-only leakage.

risks.description: The DB-backed crawled_notices lifecycle is mutable legacy compatibility behavior, not an append-only review-decision history.
risks.evidence: K labels the compatibility lifecycle in the queue/detail UI, blocks direct re-promotion in route and server actions, and permits restore only for rejected unlinked rows.
risks.deferral_reason: Append-only events and an effective-decision projection require authorized target inventory and additive implementation.
risks.next_work_unit: Implement review events, parity comparison, and compatibility projection in non-production
risks.success_criteria: Reviewers can inspect immutable decision history and the legacy queue remains compatible until approved cutover.

risks.description: Duplicate capability ownership, source_id/source_key confusion, or fuzzy source matching could cause incorrect source attribution.
risks.evidence: K fixes a one-owner convergence decision for each critical capability and records exact source resolution as a port decision.
risks.deferral_reason: The target source inventory and integrated resolver implementation are not authorized in K.
risks.next_work_unit: Port exact source resolution and enforce one canonical owner per integrated capability
risks.success_criteria: Selected cohort records resolve source_key only through exact mapping to notice_sources.source_id, with zero fuzzy or automatic-creation paths.

risks.description: Stale reports, missing body/attachment evidence, zero matches, or source failures could be presented as successful ingestion or public availability.
risks.evidence: K makes report-backed diagnostics read-only, exposes evidence availability in review, and preserves fail-closed public filtering.
risks.deferral_reason: Integrated live run evidence and source-health persistence are Phase L work.
risks.next_work_unit: Run-evidence integration, source-health visibility, and controlled projection reconciliation
risks.success_criteria: Every pilot result has attributable body/asset/run state or an explicit blocked/unavailable state with no public leakage.

risks.description: Selective personal-engine ports can diverge from main consumers, route compatibility, or the canonical source contract.
risks.evidence: K records reuse/port/merge decisions and target code boundaries instead of copying the personal repository wholesale.
risks.deferral_reason: The selected contracts require integrated implementation and cohort replay before equivalence can be proven.
risks.next_work_unit: Implement the fixed convergence matrix in main and reconcile graph-to-legacy behavior
risks.success_criteria: Selected cohort replay proves source, review, public-route, and rollback compatibility for every ported or merged capability.

risks.description: A three-source pilot can prove an integration path but cannot establish broad source coverage or parser completeness.
risks.evidence: K selects cau_001, cau_002, and yonsei_060 for distinct normal, no-assets/blocked, and source-specific adapter conditions.
risks.deferral_reason: The pilot is intentionally bounded to preserve speed and a coherent Phase L integration surface.
risks.next_work_unit: Expand the operating cohort against measured coverage, unresolved, retry, and review-latency thresholds
risks.success_criteria: A measured operating cohort expands only after defined source-health and review thresholds are met.

risks.description: Target-schema authority, authenticated admin browser evidence, and non-production environment access can be unavailable during local convergence work.
risks.evidence: K preserves a local read-only public walkthrough and records that L implementation must obtain authorized target inventory and environment authority.
risks.deferral_reason: K does not request credentials, access production data, or perform migration work.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: K does not request credentials, access production data, or perform migration work.
risks.next_work_unit: Obtain sanitized target inventory, authorized non-production access, and authenticated reviewer walkthrough evidence
risks.success_criteria: Authorized non-production evidence covers the selected cohort review path without exposing credentials or performing production actions.
